branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Causal-wave landing / projector / carrier diagnostic; running-envelope context

description: Projector support sets for the bounded-operator readout of the five causal-wave coefficients. Each projector Pi_xi, Pi_Omega, Pi_common, Pi_sync is an orthogonal projector onto a sub-lattice of the canonical N=1539 Xi-graph. The supports are encoded as integer index sets relative to the canonical lattice node enumeration in lattice_seed_canonical.json.

Pi_xi.name: Xi reaction sub-lattice
Pi_xi.physical_role: carries the Xi source coefficient alpha_xi

Pi_Omega.name: Omega-shell sub-lattice
Pi_Omega.physical_role: carries the Omega-world diffusion coefficient D(Omega)

Pi_sync.name: Sync-mode sub-lattice
Pi_sync.physical_role: carries the Sync^2 coupling coefficient eps_sync^2

Pi_xi_perp.name: Xi-orthogonal complement
Pi_xi_perp.physical_role: feeds the damping coefficient gamma via Tr[Pi_xi (1-T) Pi_xi^perp]/N
